task_completion.description: Log in to the Virtualmin control panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Virtualmin web interface is loaded in the browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Enter the target domain name in the Create Virtual Server form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create Virtual Server' form is visible with 'newclient.test' entered into the 'Domain name' field.
The 'Administration password' field is filled with 'NewClient456!' (or shows as filled if masked by asterisks/dots).

task_completion.description: Enable the required features for the virtual server
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Enable features' section of the form, checkboxes corresponding to Web/Website hosting, DNS zone, Mail/Email, and MySQL database are checked.
A success message or creation log is displayed showing 'newclient.test' was created, OR 'newclient.test' appears in the active virtual servers dropdown menu in the left sidebar.

integrity.description: The agent used the Virtualmin web GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser (https://localhost:10000) rather than a terminal window running 'virtualmin' CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Virtualmin application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show https://localhost:10000 and the standard Virtualmin interface should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: 'newclient.test'. Target password: 'NewClient456!'. Required features: Web hosting (Apache), DNS (BIND), Email (Postfix/Dovecot), MySQL database. Virtualmin URL: https://localhost:10000. Login credentials: root / GymAnything123!.
